chooseResponse.q: What do you think about the new library hours?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Have you seen the new library hours?
Advisor: Yes, I think they really accommodate late-night studying.
Student: I agree! I often study late.
Advisor: Me too! It’s nice to have that option now.

questions.q: What does the student think about the library hours?
questions.explain: 學生認為新的圖書館開放時間很好。

questions.q: What does the advisor think about late-night studying?
questions.explain: 顧問認為夜間學習是重要的。

announcement.transcript: Attention students: The campus health center will be extending its hours on weekdays to better serve you. The new hours will be from 8 AM to 8 PM. Please take advantage of this service and stay healthy!

questions.q: What is the main purpose of the announcement?
options: To change location of the center.
questions.explain: 公告的主要目的是通知學生健康中心延長開放時間。

questions.q: When will the health center be open?
questions.explain: 健康中心將在工作日的早上8點到晚上8點開放。

talk.transcript: Today, we will discuss the concept of renewable energy. Renewable energy comes from sources that are naturally replenished, such as sunlight, wind, and water. These sources are sustainable and can help reduce our carbon footprint. For instance, solar panels convert sunlight into electricity, while wind turbines harness wind power. Transitioning to renewable energy is essential for combating climate change and ensuring a healthier planet for future generations.

options: Energy that is always in demand.
Energy that has no impact on climate.
questions.explain: 可再生能源是來自自然來源的能源。
可再生能源很重要，因為它能減少污染。

questions.q: What is one use of wind energy?
questions.explain: 風能的一個用途是發電。
